title: Colorectal Histology Classifier
blurb: A ResNet50 deep-learning model that classifies colorectal tissue tiles into 8 histological categories (Kather NCT-CRC). Trained in a Google Colab AI course, then converted to a float16 ONNX model that runs entirely in your browser — no backend, no server cost. Educational demo, not for diagnostic use.
stack: TensorFlow · Keras · ONNX Runtime Web · ResNet50

title: ML Pipeline
blurb: A from-scratch machine-learning training and experimentation platform: GPU-accelerated training, transfer learning across datasets, live experiment monitoring, and real-world forecasting work (air-quality / PM2.5 prediction across cities). Built to explore how models generalize across domains.
stack: PyTorch · CUDA · Transfer Learning · Time-Series Forecasting

title: StudyBot
blurb: A browser-based study suite that pulls together focus tools and study aids into one extension. An ongoing side project exploring how small, practical tools can make studying less painful.
